ui_connect_a_gamepad_and_press_any_but: Connect a gamepad and press any button.
ui_nearcade_needs_to_install_sy: Nearcade needs to install system dependencies (drivers and virtual controllers) to run properly.
ui_a_terminal_window_will_pop_up_to_ru: A terminal window will pop up to run the installation.
ui_click_video_lock_mouse_esc_to_relea: Click video — lock mouse · ESC to release
ui_configure_app_behavior_audio_and_ne: Configure app behavior, audio, and network options.
ui_closing_the_window_hides_to_the_sys: Closing the window hides to the system tray instead of quitting.
ui_keep_the_nearcade_window_abo: Keep the Nearcade window above all other windows.
ui_saves_gpu_cycles_on_apus_stream_sti: Saves GPU cycles on APUs. Stream still sends to viewers normally.
ui_desktop_audio_is_captured_automatic: Desktop Audio is captured automatically if selected in the Linux Screen Share prompt.
ui_mix_a_specific_input_device_into_th: Mix a specific input device into the stream.
ui_how_to_capture_a_specific_app: How to capture a specific app:
ui_configure_your_arcade_session_for_n: Configure your arcade session for Nearcade.
ui_the_tunnel_carries_webpage_websocke: The tunnel carries webpage + WebSocket signaling only — WebRTC video goes UDP peer-to-peer.
ui_random_url_no_account_required_powe: Random URL · No account required · Powered by Cloudflare.
ui_uses_ssh_only_nothing_to_install_fa: Uses SSH only · Nothing to install · Fast and simple.
ui_requires_paid_plan_for_http_tcp_sig: Requires paid plan for HTTP/TCP signaling.
ui_tunnel_to_your_own_server_using_rev: Tunnel to your own server using Reverse SSH.
ui_routes_all_video_and_inputs_through: Routes all video and inputs through a custom Rust server for massive scalability.
ui_b_tostring_16_padstart_2_0_join_doc: b.toString(16).padStart(2,'0')).join(''); document.getElementById('vpsKeyInput').value = hex; document.getElementById('vpsKeyInput').type = 'text'; setTimeout(() => { const el = document.getElementById('vpsKeyInput'); if(el) el.type='password'; }, 4000); })()" style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;background:rgba(99,102,241,0.15);color:var(--accent);border:1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.3);border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--mono);">Generate
ui_remember_this_choice_don_t_ask_agai: Remember this choice don't ask again on startup
ui_you_are_about_to_start_a_peer_to_pe: You are about to start a Peer-to-Peer tunnel. This is
ui_because_it_will_expose_your_real_ip: because it will expose your real IP address to viewers instead of using a secure tunnel, and it was not the main focus of the app.
ui_choose_a_window_or_screen_to_share: Choose a window or screen to share. Your selection will be remembered.
ui_make_sure_windows_are_open_and_not: Make sure windows are open and not minimised.
ui_live_pipeline_codec_rtt_and_input_d: Live pipeline, codec, RTT, and input driver readout in the dock. Starts automatically when streaming begins.
ui_native_pipewire_offers_lower_latenc: Native PipeWire offers lower latency. Legacy PulseAudio is more compatible. The server auto-detects the best option on start.
ui_forces_xbox_one_s_profile_instead_o: Forces Xbox One S profile instead of the 360-compat fallback.
ui__existing_controllers_will_re_enume: ⚠ Existing controllers will re-enumerate on next connect.
ui_dualshock_4_dualsense_appear_native: DualShock 4 / DualSense appear natively to games. Disabled = Xbox emulation for max compat.
ui_passes_gyroscope_and_accelerometer: Passes gyroscope and accelerometer data to the host.
ui_set_the_default_input_mode_for_new: Set the default input mode for new viewers.
ui_both_gamepad_and_kbm_emulation_acti: Both gamepad and KBM emulation active simultaneously (Degraded performance). Also disables window-title auto-mapping.
ui_button_prompts_shown_in_games_requi: Button prompts shown in games. Requires viewer reconnect to re-enumerate.
ui_customize_the_on_screen_buttons_for: Customize the on-screen buttons for mobile viewers. Default keeps the clean, classic look.
ui_live_driver_packet_readout_verify_k: Live driver packet readout. Verify KBM emulation is reaching the C++ bridge without needing game focus.
ui_connected_viewers_their_assigned_in: Connected viewers, their assigned input profile, and input permission controls.
ph_paste_or_generate_a_64_char_hex_key: Paste or generate a 64-char hex key
ui_nearsec_together_is_provided_as_is: Nearcade is provided "as-is", without any express or implied warranty. In no event will the authors be held liable for any damages arising from the use of this software. Permission is granted to anyone to use this software for any purpose, subject to the enclosed license agreements.
ui_paste_a_tunnel_url_to_instantly_joi: Paste a tunnel URL to instantly join a private session, or browse public games in the Live Arcade.
ui_connect_a_controller_and_press_any: Connect a controller and press any button. The app will automatically switch to gamepad navigation mode.
ui_your_discord_status_automatically_u: Your Discord status automatically updates when you host or join a session, showing the game you are playing.
ui_deploy_and_manage_headless_game_ses: Deploy and manage headless game sessions that auto-reset when empty.
ui_browse_and_join_active_public_p2p_a: Browse and join active public P2P and Tunneled matches.
ui_configure_global_client_behaviours: Configure global client behaviours and preferences.
ui_your_name_shown_in_sessions_and_dis: Your name shown in sessions and Discord. Leave blank to randomize.
ui_allow_the_host_to_send_vibration_da: Allow the host to send vibration data to connected clients.
ui_show_your_friends_what_game_you_re: Show your friends what game you're playing on Nearcade.
ui_switches_the_host_dashboard_to_the: Switches the host dashboard to the legacy layout.
ui_skips_this_dashboard_and_jumps_stra: Skips this dashboard and jumps straight into hosting on startup.
ui_use_your_gpu_to_decode_video_for_lo: Use your GPU to decode video for lower latency and battery usage.
ui_disables_the_standard_60fps_cap_for: Disables the standard 60fps cap for high refresh rate streaming.
ui_disables_vertical_sync_for_the_abso: Disables vertical sync for the absolute lowest latency. May cause screen tearing.
ui_bypasses_system_memory_and_keeps_vi: Bypasses system memory and keeps video frames entirely on the GPU. Extremely fast, but may glitch on some hardware.
ui_discover_community_hosted_local_mul: Discover community-hosted local multiplayer sessions. High fidelity, ultra-low latency, right from your browser.
ui_host_a_game_from_the_nearsec_client: Host a game from the Nearcade client to appear here.
ui_press_any_button_to_register_your_g: Press any button to register your gamepad.
ui_nearsec_arcade_is_a_decentralized_c: Nearcade is a decentralized, community-driven platform for discovering local multiplayer games hosted by players worldwide.
ui_all_sessions_are_hosted_directly_fr: All sessions are hosted directly from the host's computer via high-speed WebRTC tunnels. Gameplay data flows peer-to-peer and is not routed through our servers.
